name: seaglass-cli
description: Teaches your ChatGPT/Codex client to drive the Seaglass memory layer through the `seaglass` CLI instead of an MCP server. Lower per-turn token cost; same backend.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory across your AI tools (CLI transport)
interface.longDescription: Drives the Seaglass memory layer through the `seaglass` CLI on PATH instead of an MCP server. Lower per-turn token cost for shell-capable clients; same backend. Requires the `seaglass` CLI installed and authenticated.
